text: Combustible gas indicators operate by drawing an air sample into the instrument

options.text: over an electrically heated platinum filament
where it is mixed with nitrogen
where it is ignited by a sparking device
where its specific gravity is measured **Correct answer : over an electrically heated platinum filament**

explanation: Combustible gas indicators (explosimeters) utilize a Wheatstone bridge circuit. An air sample is drawn over an electrically heated platinum filament; the combustion of flammable gas on the filament increases its temperature and resistance, which is then measured and displayed as a percentage of the Lower Explosive Limit (LEL).
